reviews.review_description: Big compliments to the devs of this masterpiece! It starts with the tutorial, where a very calm and friendly fox gives you tips on how to manage the new and unique game system. I really enjoyed the fly mode and the crazy, dreamy surroundings—flying rocks with houses and flying turtles!!! The boat looks quite realistic to me; the choice of wood is excellent. I hope the game is released soon so I can experience the story as well! I used the QGO at 170%, so everything looked quite sharp. Highly recommended

The game play feel alright idk if it's ideal but I got to one part right? And all of a sudden there's this black death guy throwing balls like if this was baseball with infinite balls I can't defend fast enough nor fire fast enough if I attack the rocks would bounce me back and catch me off guard and regardless I can't fire fast enough and defend like that at the same time! All others were fine no problems but when it came down to that part I couldn't even bother the game got boring to fast and I just couldn't handle that task. It's stupid.

developer_response.body: Yeah we totally get your point, some parts of the game are pretty hard. This was just a demo but in the full game we will focus more on balance. Thanks for your feedback!

reviews.review_description: I love the creativity with this game! The fights are so fun and the controls are very unique! Definitely a must try!

Great demo of a fantastical adventure that does away with thumbsticks. Run, jump, climb and soar with your wings, catching thermals. Make fireballs with your hands for magic combat, pull up a shield with your fists. Fluid fun!
